task: Design API and client surface for alert workflow actions
acceptance_criteria: Backend workflow semantics map cleanly into API and client contracts
notes: Reused stabilized workflow routes and typed client methods from child #2 instead of creating UI-local truth

task: Implement typed client and server-side web integration
acceptance_criteria: Typed client and server API usage expose new workflow endpoints without local truth duplication
validation_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web test
notes: Server actions now call acknowledge/owner/note client methods and revalidate alert list/detail surfaces

acceptance_criteria: Users can inspect and act on alerts through the web UI with explicit state feedback
validation_command: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web build
notes: Alert list/detail pages expose workflow summary and triage forms while keeping UI thin

acceptance_criteria: API and web verification pass together against the new workflow surface
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/alerting && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web build
notes: API contract tests plus web test/typecheck/build and biome checks all passed
